pullRequest.title: Fix frame collisions between extended and standard frames
pullRequest.body:
If an extended frame was having an ID that would be <= 0x7FF, then it would collide with the ID of a standard frame

This is fixed by setting the top bit i.e. OR'ing the frame by 0x80000000 similar to what is done in DBC files and in the Linux kernel

Fixes #654

pullRequest.title: Fix compiler error for code generated with --node arg
Add support for CAN FD messages in Tester

feat: add is_in_phys_range() to generated C source
